headline: Is GE Vernova Inc. (GEV) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is GEV a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on GE Vernova Inc. on Nikhs’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on GEV. GE Vernova Inc.’s share was trading at $1,038.74 as of May 25th. GEV’s trailing and forward P/E were 30.35 and 37.04 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. […]
